title: Action Required: Fix Renovate Configuration
body:
There is an error with this repository's Renovate configuration that needs to be fixed. As a precaution, Renovate will stop PRs until it is resolved.

Location: `.github/renovate.json5`
Error type: Invalid JSON5 (parsing failed)
Message: JSON5.parse error: `JSON5: invalid character '}' at 59:1`

comments.body: Oof, bad me.  I forgot to run a final validation on it :cry:
